tools.name: addJournalist
tools.description: Add a journalist to the media database with contact details and beat information.

tools.name: searchJournalists
tools.description: Search the journalist database by beat, outlet, region, or free-text query.

tools.name: createMediaList
tools.description: Create a curated media list from selected journalists.

tools.name: createPitch
tools.description: Create a pitch brief targeting specific journalists or media lists.

tools.name: logCoverage
tools.description: Log a media coverage entry with outlet, headline, sentiment, and reach.

tools.name: getCoverageReport
tools.description: Generate a coverage report for a client over a given period.
